Hold RUSDC, Earn USDC

Together Towards a Better Life with RewardUSDC (RUSDC) Be a part of the RewardUSDC (RUSDC) revolution! Add liquidity now and watch your investment grow. Our perfectly crafted smart contract ensures everyone profits, as you earn USDC coin rewards with every buy and sell. Join us, secure your future, and reap the rewards effortlessly!

rewardusdctoken
01
Services

Secure and Transparent

Secure Transactions: BNB chain ensures safety.
The RUSDC token operates as a reward system for its holders. With each buy and sell transaction of the token, fees are applied. These fees are collected in USDC, a stablecoin pegged to the US dollar, and then distributed evenly among all holders of the token.

Introducing RewardUSDC Token (RUSDC)

    • Name: RewardUSDC Token
    • Symbol: RUSDC
    • Contract: 0x792008D1d7Fd25913C091B558E3a7d4Ab404C20a (Binance Smart Chain contract)
    • Buy Tax: 3%
    • Sell Tax: 3%
    • Maximum Supply: 5 million tokens
    • Burn: 1 million tokens have been burned
    • Liquidity Lock: On PinkSale

TaxFee

Buy Tax: 3% Sell Tax: 3%

  • Maximum Supply: 5 million tokens
  • Burn: 1 million tokens have been burned
  • Liquidity Lock: On PinkSale
02
Why Us

How we do it

1.Acquiring RUSDC Tokens:

  • Purchase RUSDC tokens on supported cryptocurrency exchanges.
  • Ensure your wallet is compatible with RUSDC.

2.Holding RUSDC Tokens:

  • Simply hold RUSDC tokens in your wallet.
  • There is no need to stake or lock your tokens; holding them is enough to start earning rewards.

3.Receiving USDC Rewards:

  • As transactions occur (buying or selling RUSDC), fees are collected.
  • These fees are then redistributed to all RUSDC holders in the form of USDC.
  • Rewards are typically distributed automatically, providing a hassle-free way to earn passive income.
04

Benefits of Holding RUSDC

Effortless Earnings: No need for active trading or complex strategies. Simply hold RUSDC in your wallet.

Secure and Transparent: Built on a secure blockchain, ensuring transparency and security for all transactions.

Maximized Rewards: As the community grows and more transactions occur, the potential for earning rewards increases
